A serve override replaces the default block; the router arrives as
http.Handler.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http GET /{$}
func Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:server
func Serve(h http.Handler) error {
	srv := &http.Server{Addr: ":8080", Handler: h}
	return srv.ListenAndServe()
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.

package main

import (
	"app/web"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
)

func run() error {
	// Providers
	r := router.New()

	// Routes
	r.Method("GET", "/{$}", web.Index)

	// Serve
	return web.Serve(r)
}
